briefdescription.para: Resets the selected set popupmenus stored by IDX_StoreStartFinishForIndexing.
Locked indexing, indexes all active channels at once.
Indexes a single channel - used when indexing is unlocked.

detaileddescription.para: Callers need to call DAP_UpdateDAQControls() with REASON_STIMSET_CHANGE_DUR_DAQ.

briefdescription.para: Sum of the largest sets for each indexing step.
Return the number of steps in the largest set for a particular index number.
Return the 0-based popup menu indizes of the current WAVE/INDEX_END stimsets.
Return the number of sets on the active channel with the most sets.
determine the max number of sweeps in the largest start set on active (checked) DA or TTL channels works for unlocked (independent) indexing

parameterdescription.para: index override is the same as indexing off. some Functions that call this function only want the max number of steps in the start (active) set, when indexing is on. 1 = over ride ON

briefdescription.para: Returns the number of sweeps in the stimulus set with the smallest number of sweeps (across all active stimulus sets).

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable channel, variable channelType, variable lockedIndexing)
memberdef.name: IDX_GetSetsInRange

briefdescription.para: Returns a 1D textwave of selected set names.

detaileddescription.para:
device
panel
channel
channel
channelType
CHANNEL_TYPE_DAC or CHANNEL_TYPE_TTL
lockedIndexing
defaults to false, true returns just the DAC/TTL setname
Constants are defined at ChannelTypeAndControlConstants

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable channel, variable channelType, variable lockedIndexing)
memberdef.name: IDX_NumberOfSweepsAcrossSets

briefdescription.para: Determine the number of sweeps for a DA or TTL channel.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable channelNumber, variable channelType, variable count)
memberdef.name: IDX_UnlockedIndexingStepNo

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable count, variable channelNumber, variable channelType)
memberdef.name: IDX_DetIfCountIsAtSetBorder

briefdescription.para: Extract the list of stimsets from the control user data.
Return the stimset from the list of stimsets returned by IDX_GetStimsets()

parameterdescription.para: list of stim sets returned by IDX_GetStimsets()
[optional, defaults to false] Return the NONE stimset for idx 0. Not allowed during DAQ.
